adminImports.pageDescription: Upload your LinkedIn data-export ZIP to import positions, education, certifications, skills, and projects as draft records you confirm before they go live.
adminImports.howToGet: How to get your LinkedIn export ZIP
adminImports.step1: Go to LinkedIn.com → click your profile picture → Settings & Privacy.
adminImports.step2: In the left sidebar, click Data privacy → then Get a copy of your data.
adminImports.step3: Select "Want something in particular?" (not the full archive — that's much larger and takes days).
adminImports.step4: Check at minimum: Profile, Positions, Education, Certifications, Skills, Projects. Then click Request archive.
adminImports.step5: LinkedIn will email you a download link within 10 minutes (sometimes up to 24 h for large accounts). Download and keep the .zip file.
adminImports.step6: Upload it below. The ZIP is parsed in memory and deleted immediately — it is never stored on the server.
adminImports.privacyNote: Privacy note: Only the parsed fields (titles, dates, company names) are stored temporarily for up to 1 hour while you review the preview. The raw ZIP is never saved. Row counts are the only things logged.

adminCv.pageDescription: One JD in, any combination of artifacts out. Each is distinct: CV and cover letter download as PDFs, Q&A is copy-paste prose per question.

adminJobs.pageDescription: Jobs found by the daily poller, scored against your profile. Move them through the pipeline and generate tailored applications.
adminJobs.searchPlaceholder: e.g. React Native engineer with GraphQL...

adminPreferences.pageDescription: The single source of truth for structured application fields — start dates, work authorization, salary expectations, and EEOC demographics. The browser extension reads this to fill dropdowns, date pickers, and radio groups automatically, so the AI never has to guess or infer protected information from your bio.
adminPreferences.jobSearchIntentDesc: Work mode and location preferences shown to employers.
adminPreferences.locationAuthDesc: Country codes use ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (ES, US, DE…). Authorized countries: comma-separated list of codes where you can work without sponsorship.
adminPreferences.salaryExpectationsDesc: These values are returned as-is when a form asks for compensation. Leave blank to respond with 'Decline to answer'.
adminPreferences.adjustSalary: Adjust salary to job posting range
adminPreferences.adjustSalaryDesc: When enabled, if the job description advertises a salary range higher than your saved maximum, the extension will quote the posting's range instead of your stored figures. Useful when you'd accept the posted range even if it exceeds your baseline — prevents under-bidding on high-paying roles while keeping your minimum as a floor.
adminPreferences.demographicsDesc: These fields correspond to Equal Employment Opportunity Commission categories. All default to "Prefer not to answer" and are only ever sent as-is to the form — the AI never infers or invents values here.

options.nativeHawaiian: Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander

adminPreferences.languagePreferencesDesc: Controls what language is used for application documents and the platform UI.
adminPreferences.autoDetectDesc: When set to Auto, CV and cover-letter generation detect the language from the job description. Override to force one language for all applications.
adminPreferences.showTranslationsDesc: Enable bilingual (EN/ES) content on the public site. Uncheck to show everything in a single language.
adminPreferences.adminUiLanguageDesc: Admin interface language switching is planned for a future update. Currently English only.

adminSetup.pageDescription: Check which API keys and services are configured. Missing keys will disable the features that depend on them.
adminSetup.servicesNotConfiguredDesc: The features listed below will not work until the corresponding API keys are set in the backend environment.
adminSetup.howToConfigureStep1: Click Get key next to a missing service to open its dashboard.
adminSetup.howToConfigureStep2: Copy the API key and add it to your backend .env file (local) or environment variables (Render / hosting provider).
adminSetup.howToConfigureStep3: Restart the backend server. The status on this page will update automatically.
adminSetup.minimumLocalDevDesc: GEMINI_API_KEY (free tier covers all AI features).
adminSetup.recommendedDesc: also set GROQ_API_KEY (fallback) and COHERE_API_KEY (better match scoring).
adminSetup.fetchError: Failed to load setup status. Make sure you are logged in and the backend is running.

adminAiConfig.pageDescription: Live routing chain per feature. Skip status reflects this worker's in-process state.
